basic_details.job_title: DHS Virudhunagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Medical Officer, Security Guard and More
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Security Guard and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Virudhunagar (DHS Virudhunagar) Medical Officer, Security Guard and More Notification 2026 has been released on 18 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Virudhunagar Medical Officer, Security Guard and More Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree, Plus Two with Biology/Botany/Zoology, 8th Standard Pass, ANM/MPHW Training, Diploma in Radio Diagnosis Technology, Bachelor's Degree or Sanitary Inspector Course, Bachelor's Degree in Speech and Language Pathology
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS Degree awarded by a university or institution Recognised by the UGC for the purpose of its grants. The courses must have been approved by the medical council of india/NMC. Should have registered in Tamilnadu medical council. Multipurpose Health Worker / Health Inspector Grade II (MPHW HI Gr-II): Must have passed plus two with biology or botany and zoology. Must have passed Tamil language as a subject in SSLC level. Must possess two years for multipurpose health worker(male/inspector/sanitary inspector course training/ offered by recognized private institution /trust/universities/deemed universities including gandhigram rural institute training course certificate granted by the directorate of public health and preventive medicine. Hospital Worker: Minimum educational qualification 8th standard pass and should be able to read and write. Auxiliary Nurse Midwife (ANM): Multi Purpose Health Worker (F) training course /Auxiliary nurse Midwifery training course awarded by DPH&PM Certificate of Registration issued by the Tamil nadu Nurse and Midwives Council. Radiographer: Diploma Course in Radio diagnosis Technology (Two Years)/Certificate of Radiology Assistant in Recognized University. Senior Treatment Supervisor (STS): Bachelor's Degree or Recognized sanitary inspector course. Certificate course in computer operation (Minimum 2 Months). Permanent two-Wheeler Driving License & Should be able to drive two wheeler. Security Guard: Minimum educational qualification 8th standard pass and should be able to read and write. Audiologist/Speech Therapist: Bachelor's Degree in Speech and language pathology from any Recognized university in India

vacancy_details.Post Name: Multipurpose Health Worker / Health Inspector Grade II (MPHW HI Gr-II)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Multipurpose Health Worker / Health Inspector Grade II (MPHW HI Gr-II)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://virudhunagar.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Virudhunagar Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: MBBS Degree awarded by a university or institution Recognised by the UGC for the purpose of its grants. The courses must have been approved by the medical council of india/NMC. Should have registered in Tamilnadu medical council. Multipurpose Health Worker / Health Inspector Grade II (MPHW HI Gr-II): Must have passed plus two with biology or botany and zoology. Must have passed Tamil language as a subject in SSLC level. Must possess two years for multipurpose health worker(male/inspector/sanitary inspector course training/ offered by recognized private institution /trust/universities/deemed universities including gandhigram rural institute training course certificate granted by the directorate of public health and preventive medicine. Hospital Worker: Minimum educational qualification 8th standard pass and should be able to read and write. Auxiliary Nurse Midwife (ANM): Multi Purpose Health Worker (F) training course /Auxiliary nurse Midwifery training course awarded by DPH&PM Certificate of Registration issued by the Tamil nadu Nurse and Midwives Council. Radiographer: Diploma Course in Radio diagnosis Technology (Two Years)/Certificate of Radiology Assistant in Recognized University. Senior Treatment Supervisor (STS): Bachelor's Degree or Recognized sanitary inspector course. Certificate course in computer operation (Minimum 2 Months). Permanent two-Wheeler Driving License & Should be able to drive two wheeler. Security Guard: Minimum educational qualification 8th standard pass and should be able to read and write. Audiologist/Speech Therapist: Bachelor's Degree in Speech and language pathology from any Recognized university in India

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://virudhunagar.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DHS Virudhunagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DHS Virudhunagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for DHS Virudhunagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for various posts under the District Health Society Virudhunagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the DHS Virudhunagar Various Posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 11000 to Rs. 63000 per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from 8th standard pass to MBBS degree and other specialized diplomas/degrees.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DHS Virudhunagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Health Society Virudhunagar: http://virudhunagar.nic.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these posts?
faq.answer: The job type for these posts is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the District Health Society Virudhunagar, located in Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as per the notification.
